title: Official Information Act 1982 — New Zealand
description: New Zealand legislation establishing rights to access official information held by public sector agencies, procedures for requesting and releasing information, grounds for withholding information, and review mechanisms through the Ombudsman. Foundational for organizational information governance and transparency requirements.
